narrative:
Paulding County has 12,107 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.6 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.7% of registrants.
